title: Warm up
content: The slide displays three images depicting driving scenes from Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image shows a distinct landscape or activity associated with these cities.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide illustrates the evolving nature of China through images of taxis and cityscapes from various regions. It sets the theme for a journey through China's development.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session focuses on investigating and researching city development. It outlines a process involving local features, development strategies, and resulting outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide aligns each city with its development strategy. Beijing integrates technology and tradition, Chongqing focuses on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou emphasizes tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The perspective of taxi drivers connects to city development themes such as sustainable development, tourism, economic growth, and technology integration. The message emphasizes unique development strategies tailored to each city's local features.
